prePrompt.title: Turant duty alerts pao
prePrompt.body: Notifications on karo taaki aapke cities se match karti ride turant pata chale.

dutyAlerts.title: Duty alerts pao
dutyAlerts.addUpTo: Matching duty alerts ke liye {max} tak cities add karo
dutyAlerts.blockedHint: Notifications block hain. Inhe apne browser ya phone settings me EaseCab ke liye on karein, phir toggle dobara dabayein.
